problem id: 12e947ca
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10010001 -> 00001000
  00011101 -> 01001110
  10010101 -> 00001010
  11110001 -> 00111000
  01001000 -> 00100100
  01010100 -> 00101010
  00010010 -> 10001001
  11100101 -> 00110010
  11101100 -> 01110110
  10110001 -> 00011000

query: 11111101
predicted answer: 00111110
